home.headline: Hardware,
home.description: A curated catalog of laptops, networking, mobile, and accessories from HP, Dell, ASUS, TP-Link, and the in-house D-Tech line. Browse the showroom. Inquire when you find the machine.
home.featuredSubtitle: Five products we think are worth your time.
home.brandsSubtitle: We carry brands that match the showroom standard.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Find by what you need it for, not what we call it.

brands.indexSubtitle: Five lines selected for build quality, distribution rights, and product depth.

categories.indexSubtitle: Browse the catalog by what you're looking for.

search.heading: Search results
search.placeholder: Search for a product, brand, or category
search.noResultsHint: Try a different search term or browse the catalog directly.
search.tooShort: Search must be at least 2 characters

inquiry.heading: Inquire about
inquiry.subheading: Send us a message about this product. We'll respond within one business day.
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you'd like to know about this product...
inquiry.sentMessage: We've received your inquiry and will respond within one business day.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters
errors.submitFailed: Could not send inquiry. Please try again.

about.heading: About Dtech
about.introduction: Dtech is an Algerian technology distributor based in Algiers. We carry hardware from HP, Dell, ASUS, TP-Link, and our in-house D-Tech line, serving businesses and individuals across Algeria.
about.approachBody: We curate what we carry. We don't list every SKU available from every manufacturer. We carry products we'd recommend, and we present each one with the attention it deserves.
about.contactBody: For product inquiries, use the inquiry button on any product page. For partnership or wholesale inquiries, write to us directly.

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.heading: We couldn't find that page
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.heading: An error occurred
errors.description: We've been notified. Please try again or return to the home page.

metadata.defaultDescription: A curated catalog of laptops, networking, mobile, and accessories from HP, Dell, ASUS, TP-Link, and the in-house D-Tech line.
